title: Liquid Silence Water Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Liquid Silence Water Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic Liquid Silence water portrait built around adult young East Asian woman standing waist-deep beside a calm reflective pool with natural clean face, covered shoulders, and damp hair, opaque long-sleeve ivory editorial dress with a high neckline, and bright natural water scene with large calm water surface and subtle reflections. Subject: adult young East Asian woman standing waist-deep beside a calm reflective pool with natural clean face, covered shoulders, and damp hair appears natural, alive, clean, and calm with realistic complexion, natural lip color, damp hair, and quiet fashion-editorial presence. Scene: bright natural water scene with large calm water surface and subtle reflections provides the bright natural water surface, soft reflections, clean covered-shoulder space, and perfume-campaign stillness. Composition: high-angle close half-body composition with covered shoulders in frame and quiet alive expression; fixed vertical 9:16 high-angle close half-body composition with covered shoulders and large water surface visible, face clean and not cut by harsh light. Signature Elements: The template identity is the covered-shoulder adult East Asian subject beside calm reflective water, bright natural water, ivory fabric, damp hair, high-angle close crop, and quiet Liquid Silence mood. Style: Realistic cinematic water portrait with quiet fashion editorial and perfume campaign mood, soft fabric detail, natural water movement, realistic photography, and restrained elegance. Color Palette: Fixed bright natural water tones, opaque ivory fabric, healthy skin, damp dark hair, pale daylight reflections, and low-saturation clean editorial color. Lighting: Bright natural daylight mainly on water, covered shoulders, and fabric; subtle water reflections; clean face light without harsh bands crossing the face. Camera: High-angle close half-body portrait, vertical 9:16 crop, covered shoulders and water surface, soft depth, and calm editorial framing. Materials: opaque long-sleeve ivory editorial dress with a high neckline remains tactile with opaque damp fabric folds, water reflections, natural skin texture, wet hair strands, and soft daylight detail. Typography: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
